ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Explore additional books from Extra Helpings or Library.
[ ] Encourage students to further explore lesson activities and outdoor work.

[ ] Website: [Bat Walk Opportunities](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.batcon.org/see-bats-live/join-a-bat-walk/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1748546333041144&usg=AOvVaw1pu0kavQR54DPFLdeoDpo5) by Bat Conservation International
